testcase.name: Valid Login
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Valid Login &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/features/Login.feature:2&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mUser opens the login page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.cucumber.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_opens_the_login_page()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22muser enters the username &amp#27;[1m"priya@gmail.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.cucumber.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_the_username(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22muser enters the password &amp#27;[1m"priya"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.cucumber.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_the_password(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mclick the Login Button&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.cucumber.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.click_the_login_button()&amp#27;[39m
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.
